Variables.Name: Positive_X
Variables.Description: Whether the positive X axis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: Positive_Y
Variables.Description: Whether the positive Y axis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: Positive_Z
Variables.Description: Whether the positive Z axis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: Negative_X
Variables.Description: Whether the negative X axis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: Negative_Y
Variables.Description: Whether the negative Y axis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: Negative_Z
Variables.Description: Whether the negative Zaxis is valid for spawning.

Variables.Name: SurfaceOnly
Variables.Description: Whether particles will only spawn on the surface of the primitive.

Variables.Name: Velocity
Variables.Description: Whether the particle should get its velocity from the position within the primitive.

Variables.Name: VelocityScale
Variables.Description: The scale applied to the velocity. (Only used if 'Velocity' is checked).

Variables.Name: StartLocation
Variables.Description: The location of the bounding primitive relative to the position of the emitter.
